summary: Iteration 2 (Class -> Stream -> Career flow) tested end-to-end. All 13 backend endpoints behave correctly with India-specific seed data; all 7 frontend flows render and interact correctly. No blockers.
passed: GET /api/classes/10 -> class + streams=[] (expected, 10 has no mapped streams)
GET /api/classes/11 -> class + 5 streams (science-pcm, science-pcb, commerce, humanities, hybrid)
GET /api/careers?category=tech -> 5 Technology careers (Data Scientist, Software Engineer, AI/ML Engineer, Game Developer, Cybersecurity Analyst)
GET /api/categories -> 8 categories (tech, design, health, biz, law, media, edu, engg)
Frontend /classes: class-explorer-page renders with 6 class-card-link-{8,9,10,11,12,UG}; clicking class 11 navigates to /classes/11 and shows all 5 streams (PCM, PCB, Commerce, Humanities, Hybrid)

Frontend /careers: career-library-page renders, 25 unique career cards, search 'data' narrows to Data Scientist, 'xyznotreal' shows career-library-empty empty state, category=tech filter shows 5 Technology careers and excludes Chartered Accountant
Frontend /careers/data-scientist: career-detail-page renders with career-detail-title 'Data Scientist', salary bands (LPA visible), required skills (Python visible)
Navbar: Classes / Streams / Careers nav items enabled (no Soon badge); Career DNA, AI Mentor, Scholarships still show SOON as expected
notes: Auth UI deferred this iteration per scope. 'Sign in' / 'Get started' header buttons not exercised. Test selectors initially over-counted career cards (50 vs 25) because the testid prefix career-card matches multiple nested elements per card; verified by math across search/filter results - all functional counts are correct.
